name: Youtinn 1000 2.0 nozzle
machine_start_gcode:
BED_MESH_PROFILE LOAD='default'
Z_COUNT_SET0
M140 S[bed_temperature_initial_layer_single]
SET_HEATER_TEMPERATURE HEATER=BOX_TEMP TARGET=0
M104 S[nozzle_temperature] T0
M104 S[nozzle_temperature2] T1
M109 S[nozzle_temperature] T0
M109 S[nozzle_temperature2] T1
PRINT_START
